{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent audits the load-bearing claim about the Conforti–Cornuéjols bound and identifies a logical error.",
    "R1.6": "The writing polish is improved in some problem paragraphs, but not consistently.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty disclosure is minimal; all output is presented as equally confident.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions are introduced, but the reported empirical results contradict rather than support the theoretical claim.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."

rationale.R1.3: The agent audits the load-bearing claim about the Conforti–Cornuéjols bound and identifies a logical error.
rationale.R1.6: The writing polish is improved in some problem paragraphs, but not consistently.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is minimal; all output is presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are introduced, but the reported empirical results contradict rather than support the theoretical claim.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
